reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente es la unica estacion para detenerse entre Comodoro y Trelew
Los Baños son un asco llenos de moscas, sucios, tapados, sin agua ni papel.
La atencion de los playeros es lenta ni hablar si esta el camion descargando.
Cero inversion en la infraestructura de la estacion, una de las peores YPF del sur

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, it's the only stop between Comodoro and Trelew.
The restrooms are disgusting: full of flies, dirty, clogged, with no water or toilet paper.
The service from the beach attendants is slow, let alone when the truck is unloading.
Zero investment in the station's infrastructure, one of the worst in the southern YPF area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMnVtS2xBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena parada los chicos muy atentos y amables. El café nos ayudó a seguir ruta ❤️ muchas gracias

(Translated by Google)
Great stop, the guys were very attentive and friendly. The coffee helped us continue our journey ❤️ Thank you so much

reviews.comment:
Un oasis que separa muchos kilómetros de la nada misma a excepción de la mítica RN3. Si o sí tenés que cargar combustible en ese lugar.

(Translated by Google)
An oasis that separates many kilometers from absolutely nowhere, except for the legendary RN3. You absolutely have to refuel there.

reviews.comment:
Un oasis en el desierto, excelente lugar para parar y despejarse, consumir alguno de los productos que están a buen precio. Los sandwich de miga o chips excelente siempre.

(Translated by Google)
An oasis in the desert, an excellent place to stop and unwind, and enjoy some of the reasonably priced products. The finger sandwiches or chips are always excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNE4zSjBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención  del personal lugar para estacionar amplio tiene duchas y limpios los baños comida básico.

(Translated by Google)
Very good staff service, ample parking, clean showers and restrooms, basic food.
